title: Ecreate
description: This is a Custom Ore/blocks/armor/tools mod
body:
This mod serves as the **core framework for the Easy Create Modpack**, built to expand and enhance your gameplay experience. It introduces a variety of **powerful new tools and armor sets**, **custom ores**, and **unique items** designed to bring more depth and excitement to your world.

Whether you're mining, building, automating, or exploring, this mod adds high-tier content to help you progress faster while keeping things balanced and fun. It's especially useful for those who enjoy the **Create mod** but want more late-game gear and resources to play with.

Beyond just adding content, this core mod ensures **full compatibility and stability** across all features in the Easy Create Modpack. It acts as a bridge between various mods and custom systems, making everything work together smoothly.

While originally created for the modpack, this mod can also be used in custom setups. However, it does **require the Create mod** to function properly.

Perfect for both casual players and automation enthusiasts, this mod is your key to unlocking the full potential of the Easy Create experience.
